steps.title: Spot the agreement signal
steps.content: The word “concurring” is the key signal—it indicates that Rehren is supporting the same conclusion about glass availability that Hodgkinson reached.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Likewise” directly expresses this parallelism—the transition shows both researchers making comparable points. The other three wrongly suggest different relationships: “As such” and “Consequently” imply causation, while “Nonetheless” introduces contrast. That matches choice B — B is correct.
